'''zagufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enallachrome|enallachrome]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-g-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enallachrome|enallachrome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zagufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zægifith|zægifith]] || [[word:zægifij|zægifij]] || [[word:zægifish|zægifish]] || [[word:zægifi|zægifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zagugufuth|zagugufuth]] || [[word:zagugufuj|zagugufuj]] || [[word:zagugufush|zagugufush]] || [[word:zagugufu|zagugufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zagufuth|zagufuth]] || [[word:zagufuj|zagufuj]] || [[word:zagufush|zagufush]] || [[word:zagufu|zagufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zaguffuth|zaguffuth]] || [[word:zaguffuj|zaguffuj]] || [[word:zaguffush|zaguffush]] || [[word:zaguffuf|zaguffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zagufuthu|zagufuthu]] || [[word:zagufuju|zagufuju]] || [[word:zagufushu|zagufushu]] || [[word:zagufuku|zagufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zagufuth|zagufuth]] || [[word:zagufuj|zagufuj]] || [[word:zagufush|zagufush]] || [[word:zagufu|zagufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zagufuthul|zagufuthul]] || [[word:zagufujul|zagufujul]] || [[word:zagufushul|zagufushul]] || [[word:zagufukul|zagufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zagufuthuthu|zagufuthuthu]] || [[word:zagufujuju|zagufujuju]] || [[word:zagufushushu|zagufushushu]] || [[word:zagufuku|zagufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zagufuthun|zagufuthun]] || [[word:zagufujun|zagufujun]] || [[word:zagufushun|zagufushun]] || [[word:zagufukun|zagufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zagufuthuoro|zagufuthuoro]] || [[word:zagufujuoro|zagufujuoro]] || [[word:zagufushuoro|zagufushuoro]] || [[word:zagufukuoro|zagufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
